release: Benchmark V2 / OrgX-Bench v0.2 Initiative Worlds Preview

policy.publicValidationPurpose: The existing catalog remains public validation for harness transparency, smoke testing, and contamination-visible examples.
policy.headlineScorePurpose: Headline scores must come from private holdout Initiative Worlds with hidden state, isolated validators, and timed human baselines.
policy.saturationTrigger: Approaching saturation begins when 3 independent frontier systems exceed 75% World Success Rate with <=5% confidence interval and no severe trust violations above 5%.

public_validation.description: Open task catalog used for methodology transparency and runner validation.

initiative_worlds_preview.description: Open preview worlds that prove schema, receipt, and validator architecture. These do not produce headline scores.

private_holdout.description: Private worlds with off-repo validator bundles, reference answers, and timed human baselines. Headline numbers come from this split.

rotating_canary.description: Quarterly private worlds used to detect overfitting and benchmark contamination.

world_outline_backlog.description: Not runnable yet. These outlines define the next Initiative Worlds to implement.
